_schema.id: Stable slug used as the checkbox value in the LTI content picker — never reuse or repurpose one
_schema.title: Title shown in the picker and sent to the LMS as the link's title
_schema.description: One-line plain-text description (Australian English) shown in the picker and sent as the link's text
_schema.url: Absolute https://www.ntlsn.com/... URL of a real page at repo root — free, public, no login
_schema.icon: Optional absolute https icon URL sent with the content item

items.title: Crash Courses
items.description: Short, self-paced crash courses on core teaching practice — assessment, feedback, curriculum, GenAI and more.

items.title: Generative AI: A Crash Course for Academics
items.description: A practical introduction to generative AI for university teaching — what it is, what it changes, and what to do about it.

items.title: What's On across the sector
items.description: Live listing of symposia, workshops and professional development across all 42 Australian universities.

items.title: Rubric Builder
items.description: Build a criterion-referenced marking rubric step by step, then export it for your LMS or unit outline.

items.title: Learning Outcome Builder
items.description: Draft measurable, constructively aligned learning outcomes with verb guidance mapped to AQF levels.

items.title: Active-Learning Session Planner
items.description: Turn a class into a timed run-sheet with active-learning segments sized to your session length.

items.title: Feedback and Feedforward Builder
items.description: Compose student feedback that actually helps — structured feed-up, feedback and feedforward comments.

items.title: MCQ Quality Checker
items.description: Check multiple-choice questions against item-writing rules and fix common flaws before the exam does.

items.title: Calibration Suite
items.description: Run a marking-calibration session with colleagues — shared samples, blind marks, and a live spread of results.

items.title: Peer-Review Exchange
items.description: Structured peer review of teaching: pair up, observe, and exchange evidence-ready reports.

items.title: Evidence Cross-Walk
items.description: Map one piece of teaching evidence across promotion, fellowship and award frameworks in a single pass.

items.title: Recognition GPS
items.description: Plot a route through teaching-recognition options — awards, fellowships and promotion — from where you are now.

items.title: Open Badges
items.description: Issue yourself a portable, verifiable teaching-recognition claim as an Open Badge.

items.title: Accessibility Pre-flight
items.description: Pre-flight checklist for slides, PDFs and LMS pages against WCAG 2.2 AA before students see them.
